title: Contribute
philosophy: Everyone is simultaneously a receiver and a giver. The question is not who has and who needs — it is what do you currently carry, and who is at the place you've already moved through?

find.title: Find Contributions
find.subtitle: Browse what people are carrying that someone else needs.
find.empty: No contribution offers match your filters.

typeDescriptions.ACCOMPANIMENT: Walking alongside someone through a process you've already navigated
typeDescriptions.KNOWLEDGE_COMMONS: Documenting something for future reuse — async, low barrier

offer.prerequisites: What needs to be true before you'll accept a request (optional)

request.type: What kind of contribution do you need?
request.willDoWith: What will you do with what you receive? (optional — not a gate, a cue)

feedback.title: Reflect on this contribution
feedback.prompt: What happened? What did you receive? What did you bring? What shifted?
feedback.required: Reflection is required to complete this connection.
feedback.publicNote: This reflection lives on the connection record — not on either person's profile.

forwardReciprocity.title: What do you now carry that someone else needs?
forwardReciprocity.body: You've received something of value. The forward move: offer something to someone earlier in the journey than you.

health.title: Community contribution health
health.alert: Fewer than 15% of members are in reflection or rest. The community may be depleting its contributors.

landing.title: What do you carry that someone else needs?
landing.subtitle: Contribution flows in all directions. Offer what you have, ask for what you need, or find someone already offering it.

offerCard.title: Offer something
offerCard.description: Share a skill, knowledge, or your presence with the community.

requestCard.title: Request support
requestCard.description: Be honest about what you need. Someone out there has it.

browseCard.title: Browse offers
browseCard.description: See what the community is already offering.

contributionSection.title: Contribution exchange
contributionSection.subtitle: Offer what you carry, request what you need, browse available offers, or follow up on active connections.

volunteerSection.title: Volunteer opportunities
volunteerSection.subtitle: Find concrete places to help or post a request for volunteers without mixing volunteer filters into contribution offers.

connectionsCard.title: View connections
connectionsCard.description: Follow active contribution connections and complete reflections.

myRequestsCard.title: My requests
myRequestsCard.description: View and withdraw your pending contribution requests.

volunteerBrowseCard.title: Browse volunteer opportunities
volunteerBrowseCard.description: Explore published volunteer requests by domain, format, and commitment.

volunteerPostCard.title: Post a volunteer request
volunteerPostCard.description: Create a structured opportunity for people who want to help.

browse.title: Browse Offers
browse.empty: No offers available yet. Be the first to contribute.

connections.title: My Connections
connections.empty: No connections yet. Browse offers to get started.
connections.addReflection: Add a public reflection to mark this connection complete.

newOffer.title: Post a contribution offer
newOffer.subtitle: Describe what you carry and who it might serve.

myOffers.title: My Contribution Offers
myOffers.empty: You have not created any contribution offers yet.

newRequest.title: Request Support
newRequest.description: Ask the community for the contribution, skill, or accompaniment you need right now.

newOffer.title: Offer a Contribution
newOffer.description: Share what you carry and how it might serve others.

newRequest.title: Request Support
newRequest.subtitle: Be honest about what you need. Someone out there carries exactly that.

form.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.typeQuestion: What kind of contribution are you offering?
form.typeHint: Choose the nature of what you bring.

SKILL_OFFERING.label: Skill Offering
SKILL_OFFERING.description: Share a practical skill or expertise you have developed.

ACCOMPANIMENT.label: Accompaniment
ACCOMPANIMENT.description: Walk alongside someone through a process or challenge.

KNOWLEDGE_COMMONS.label: Knowledge Commons
KNOWLEDGE_COMMONS.description: Contribute knowledge freely to a shared common resource.

HOLDING_SPACE.label: Holding Space
HOLDING_SPACE.description: Offer a safe, supportive presence for someone's process.

form.domainHint: What field or cause does this contribution relate to?
form.whoServesHint: Help others understand who benefits from your contribution.
form.logisticsQuestion: How does it work in practice?
form.logisticsHint: Help people understand what working with you looks like.
form.timeCommitmentHint: How much time will this take from the other person?
form.formatHint: How will the contribution be delivered?
form.availabilityHint: When are you generally available for this?
form.prereqsHint: Optional — leave blank if anyone is welcome.
form.prerequisitesPlaceholder: e.g. Basic familiarity with systems thinking, openness to reflective practice...
form.fillRequired: Please fill in time commitment, format, and availability to continue.

requestForm.successBody: Browse offers to find someone who can help.
requestForm.whatNeededPlaceholder: Describe specifically what you're looking for and why it matters.
requestForm.alreadyTriedPlaceholder: Context helps contributors understand where you're starting from.
requestForm.willDoWithLabel: What will you do with this?
requestForm.willDoWithPlaceholder: Sharing your intent helps contributors decide if they're a good fit.

myRequests.title: My Contribution Requests
myRequests.subtitle: Your pending contribution requests. Withdraw a request if it is no longer needed.
myRequests.empty: You have no pending contribution requests.
